statement.en: Efficient 3D Model for Electromagnetic Scattering by a Set of Circular Cylinders of Finite Lengths

proposer: Matthieu Elineau, Lucille Kuhler, Alexandre Chabory

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: The axiom describes a technical computational model (3D EM scattering by finite cylinders) that is mathematically well-defined but presented as a preprint dated 2026-04-25 (future date, likely data error or categorization test). The model itself is provisionally validated—implementable and theoretically sound, but lacks peer-review confirmation. Classification as FLOWING reflects the preprint status and pending validation cycle.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 有限な筒が無限の波を折り畳み、束ねられた光として立ち現れる。

visualGlyph.interpretation: 円筒の周りを螺旋状に巻き付く電磁波が、軸方向の有限性に縛られている。
